title: RuntimeSignal
description: Normalized runtime signal schema for the Dark Factory governance pipeline. All signals, regardless of ingestion mode, are normalized to this format before entering the pipeline.

signal_id.description: Unique identifier assigned at ingestion time.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the signal was generated at the source.

ingested_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the signal entered the governance pipeline.

name.description: Identifier for the specific source system.

adapter_version.description: Version of the adapter that ingested this signal.

severity.description: Severity as classified at ingestion. May be reclassified downstream.

affected_component.description: Service, module, or infrastructure component affected. Must match a component registered in the governance component registry.

affected_components_secondary.description: Additional components affected by blast radius.

metrics.description: Quantitative data associated with the signal.

context.description: Arbitrary key-value context from the source system.

correlation_ids.description: Trace IDs, request IDs, or other identifiers for cross-referencing with observability systems.

fingerprint.description: Computed hash for deduplication. SHA-256(category + affected_component + severity + normalize_whitespace(message)[0:256]).
